description: Social Strategy — Prompt Library Package Manifest. Describes all prompt files included in the 2026-04-19 import.

deduplication_summary.deduplication_method: Exact string match for identical; Levenshtein + semantic similarity for near-duplicate detection (>=90% threshold)

master_library.description: All 47 unique prompts with full metadata: id, title, prompt_text, tags, industry, example_use_case, source, created_at

industry_splits.description: Per-industry prompt routing files. Each file contains industry metadata, platform priorities, content angles, hashtag groups, and refs to relevant master prompts.

variation_packages.description: Five audience/style variation packages that modify how base prompts are applied. Each variation includes tone modifiers, prompt overrides, and example content.

files.name: Data-Driven
files.description: Metrics-first, evidence-based content. For analytical B2B audiences.

files.name: Founder
files.description: Personal story-driven content from founder perspective. Builds trust and authenticity.

files.name: Aggressive
files.description: Bold, direct-response variation for promotional campaigns and high-intent audiences.

files.name: Beginner
files.description: Simplified, jargon-free variation for businesses new to social media.

files.name: Agency
files.description: White-label, agency-grade variation for marketing agencies managing client accounts.

seed_script.description: Firestore seed script to import all 47 master prompts into the prompts Firestore collection.

backups.description: Raw text backups of source prompt files before deduplication processing.

ui_scaffold.reason: UI components for prompt library browsing and management are excluded from this import. These will be added in a follow-up PR if requested.

usage.content_generation: Pass prompt_text from master-prompts.json to the AI endpoint. Substitute {variables} with user/brand data.
usage.industry_routing: Match detected industry to an industry file. Use prompt_refs to load relevant prompts.
usage.variation_application: Apply variation's prompt_overrides to the base prompt before AI call.
usage.firestore_seeding: Run seeds/firestore-seed-prompts-2026-04-19.js to populate the Firestore prompts collection.
